data.content: Implementation handoff: Branch `codex/foolery-c4db-worker-a` pushed to origin at commit `4ef95a81c7f0dbafd2aea4a55b64096f381e05b0`. OpenCode `permission.asked` events now extract into `ApprovalRequest` with adapter/source, permission name, patterns, metadata/params summary, OpenCode session id, request id, and tool context. OpenCode HTTP session translation now preserves permission events from response parts plus event/stream/item collections instead of dropping them. Verification passed: focused approval visibility tests, focused OpenCode HTTP/session tests, `bun run lint`, and `bunx tsc --noEmit`.
